feature_delivery_shape: serial shared-surface joins with intra-phase parallel batches

cognition.advisory: Missing cognition coverage for .specify/testing/ is advisory for artifact-only sp-tasks; minimal live reads were used.
missing_coverage: path not covered by project cognition index: .specify/testing/

MP-001: T003-T020 preserve quality while speeding verification

parallel_opportunities.validation: T001/T002 handoffs; no diffs outside task artifacts

parallel_opportunities.objective: Independent RED tests in separate files
parallel_opportunities.validation: Focused bun test command fails for expected missing behavior only

parallel_opportunities.objective: Parallel fast-mode lane setup and PR area helper update after shared types are stable
Parallel package script registration and impact fast-lane output
Parallel PR mode layering and risk policy update
Parallel runner execution update and impact escalation output
parallel_opportunities.validation: layered-pr, coverage, runner, and risk tests

join_points.name: Guardrails Confirmed
join_points.validation_target: Existing quality-gate and PR policy patterns are named in handoffs.
join_points.validation_command: Review T001/T002 handoffs; no file diffs except task artifacts.
join_points.pass_condition: No implementation work starts until mode, runner, reporter, impact, and policy ownership is understood.

join_points.name: RED Contracts Written
join_points.validation_target: Focused tests exist and fail only for missing planned behavior.
join_points.validation_command: bun test scripts/quality-gate/fast-mode.test.ts scripts/quality-gate/layered-pr.test.ts scripts/pr/fast-lane-selection.test.ts scripts/pr/risk-escalation.test.ts
join_points.pass_condition: Failures are expected RED failures, not syntax/import/setup errors.

join_points.name: Shared Types Stable
join_points.validation_target: QualityGateMode, lane metadata, risk, report, and coverage types are available.
join_points.pass_condition: Existing runner tests pass and downstream type consumers compile.

join_points.name: Fast Lane Complete
join_points.validation_target: quality:fast dry-run resolves and impact report emits fast-lane tests.
join_points.validation_command: bun run quality:fast --dry-run; bun test scripts/quality-gate/fast-mode.test.ts scripts/pr/fast-lane-selection.test.ts
join_points.pass_condition: Fast mode is lightweight, explainable, and not PR-ready.

join_points.name: Layered PR And Escalation Complete
join_points.validation_target: PR layering, changed-line coverage, and escalated checks are wired.
join_points.pass_condition: Low-risk PRs skip heavy checks with reasons; high-risk fixtures trigger heavy checks.

join_points.name: Output Semantics Clear
join_points.validation_target: Fast/full reports have clear readiness labels.
join_points.pass_condition: Fast mode reports readyForMerge=false and NOT PR READY; PR mode reports PR READINESS.

join_points.name: Final Validation Evidence Ready
join_points.validation_target: Focused tests, dry-run gates, and policy checks have recorded output.
join_points.pass_condition: Validation output is available for quickstart and handoff; live/release gaps are explicit.
